message:
⚡ Performance overhaul: skip offline clusters, SSE-only data fetching (#1015)

Backend:
- Add HealthyClusters() to filter clusters by cached health status
- SSE streamClusters() skips offline clusters with instant cluster_skipped events
- Add 45s overall SSE deadline to prevent browser hanging
- Raise maxResponseDeadline from 5s to 30s for REST fallback
- Bump pod SSE per-cluster timeout from 10s to 15s for large clusters
- Replace DeduplicatedClusters() with HealthyClusters() in all 31 handlers

Frontend:
- Convert 8 REST-only hooks to SSE streaming (usePods, useAllPods,
  usePodIssues, useDeploymentIssues, useEvents, useWarningEvents,
  useSecurityIssues, useNodes)
- Remove REST fallback from useJobs (already had SSE)
- Reduce SSE client timeout from 240s to 60s
- Increase health check concurrency from 2 to 6
- Reduce per-cluster health timeout from 65s to 15s

Impact: Dashboard data arrives progressively in 3-5s instead of blocking
30+ seconds on offline clusters. Health checks complete in 15-45s max
instead of 300+s.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
